race.comment: BELCONY (8) gets the nod. She's just found one better in three runs since a fresh win, trying hard over this route when beaten a long neck last time out. Getting Luke Cartwright is a positive in this apprentice-only race and she should take beating again. VICTORY TUNE (4) is going well without winning, working home well for third in a handy race here last time out. He can go again for his second attempt at 1400m. SAVAMOON (5) struggled here first up when fading to the line in eighth. He's better than that and should take catching with Pozman on a positive. SWEET JASMINE (1) won narrowly first up at Sale and can go on with it.
